Mask of Deception  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: FACE
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 4
CHA: +13
SV MAGIC: +7
Effect: Illusion Dark Elf (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 6.0) at Level 15
WT: 0.4 Size: SMALL
Class: BRD ROG
Race: ALL except ERU HIE TRL OGR IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Mask of Deception
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: FACE
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 4
CHA: +13
SV MAGIC: +7
Effect: Illusion Dark Elf (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 6.0) at Level 15
WT: 0.4 Size: SMALL
Class: BRD ROG
Race: ALL except ERU HIE TRL OGR IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Illusion
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Naan Aokiri
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-14 17:45:26
Page Updated:Mon Apr 10th, 2017

Expansion: Original
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 30
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Lower Guk
NPC Name
a ghoul assassin - Lower Guk
The Fabled Ghoul Assassin


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Lower Guk


Uploaded January 11th, 2023 by iventheassassin

Not Too Bad
QuoteReply
# Feb 20 2014 at 7:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1644193050985
Scholar
20 posts
It only took me about 4 hours total to get the mask to drop. It dropped on the 4th assassin. The mobs spawn every 25 minutes or so in the assassin's room, so just post up there and watch a movie or kill some time on another toon and keep one minimized.

Fearwin - Shadow Knight of <Warp Riders>
Tierwin - Bard of <Warp Riders>
Auranthis - Shaman of <Warp Riders>
▲ Page top
Clickie Socials!
QuoteReply
# Sep 26 2013 at 8:06 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1603066978812
1 post
Here's a great way to enable and disable this item with a couple of socials:

Social 1: Enables DE Illusion

/pause 10, /blockspell remove me 590
/useitem 32
/lang 5

This assumes:
* you have the mask in your inventory, at the very bottom right bag slot (I don't have VoA yet so I can't do click in bag yet, maybe someone can tell me which slot number would be for an in-bag setup, assuming this now works as an in-bag click)
* that you have at least the first 5 languages, so that you can switch to Dark Elf speech for authenticity (but the last line can be omitted, it's just there for RP :D )

Social 2: Cancels DE Illusion

/blockspell add me 590
/lang 1

This blocks the buff, in effect removing the illusion if you are wearing it (and I believe it will also block an enchanter illusion DE spell) which is the reason for line one of the social, removing this restriction before recasting it. Again, the last line can be omitted at your discretion. I got the spell number from right here at ZAM, from the spell details page - the very end of the URL which says "spell=590".

Enjoy!

Telecaster, Bard of the 20th Season, Povar

Edited, Sep 26th 2013 10:09am by PaladinBlue

Edited, Sep 26th 2013 10:11am by PaladinBlue

View User Forum
Scholar

I can confirm that this is NOT CLICKABLE FROM INVENTORY! I just took my 60 chanter and 32 Ogre zerker down here to check just that. Zerker looted it, tried clicking it, and got response "Your race, class, deity cannot use this item."

Would've been great for my ogre =(

RE: confirm
QuoteReply
# Aug 17 2005 at 9:23 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591850454699
3 posts
I think the reason you could not use from inventory may have something to do with the fact that you are a zerker and not a bard/rogue like the item plainly states
▲ Page top
RE: confirm
QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2005 at 12:38 AM Rating: Good
Kalysta
Scholar
1,087 posts
uh.. read much?
He did say in the post he went just for the sake of testing it.
The previous version, Guise of the Deceiver, was bard/rogue only, clickable by anyone from inventory. It now no longer drops, and was replaced by the Mask of Deception. A few people still wonder if the new one was inventory clickable like the old one.
____________________________
Pain Mistress Okami L`Assundre of Tarew Marr
Dark Elf Shadow Knight

Long Boring Camp - My bad luck
QuoteReply
# Apr 25 2005 at 8:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591780668686
20 posts
Well, 7 hours and a whole bunch of 25-30 minute spawn cycles later I finally got it. Saw 2 assassin spawns, first one dropped the dirk (boy was I mad), and the second dropped the mask.

It'll be a while before I go back into Lower Guk, that's for sure.
▲ Page top
RE: Long Boring Camp - My bad luck
QuoteReply
# May 01 2005 at 4:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592343422925
Scholar
167 posts
Had one of these on my own and several friends' rogues so I thought it would be easy to get another for my new bard.

About 8 hours later Assasin finally spawned and darn EQ crashes to server select, then gives me a "character logged in" error. I get there and watch the body poof.

Several hours later, Assasin spawns but drops the Dirk.

A couple hours again and I finally got mask....sigh. That was painful.


▲ Page top
Illusion doenst work
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2005 at 1:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592263786472
3 posts
Can anyone give a reason why the illusion might not work. i have the mask of deception for my 55 rogue and i cast the spell and i appear as a DE but when i try to enter Neriak i am alwoays attacked. Does faction have anything to do with whether or not the illusion will work?
▲ Page top
RE: Illusion doenst work
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2005 at 1:35 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592343807431
Sage
3,128 posts
Quote:
Can anyone give a reason why the illusion might not work. i have the mask of deception for my 55 rogue and i cast the spell and i appear as a DE but when i try to enter Neriak i am alwoays attacked. Does faction have anything to do with whether or not the illusion will work?


There are multiple possibilities, let me start with the obvious one.
- The illusion fades when you zone. Each time you zone you must recast it.
- The illusion effects your faction in a positive way, but if you faction is really bad you might still be KoS, like as if you were a DE and had hunted your own kind until you were KOS. This might be casued by your diety, but do not know what diety a rogue could have that would do that, my rogue has bristlebane and it works with him and the smurfs just hate bristlebane. Also if yopu hunted way too many DE at earlier levels.

After I got this mask, I went into Neriak 3rd Gate and did the red wine quest until I was no longer KoS to the guards even without the mask.

Edited, Fri Feb 11 13:53:16 2005
▲ Page top
RE: Illusion doenst work
QuoteReply
# Mar 12 2005 at 2:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592343875188
Scholar
18 posts
Wood Elf rogues and bards can choose Tunare, and I think Half Elves can as well. She may be enough, since Innorruuk hates her more than any other god in the pantheon.

Edited, Sat Mar 12 02:49:14 2005

I play A 55 Iksar War on Solusek Ro And i Equiped a Rogue i Gave a 66 Rogue 2.k He Took Me to Guk/Lguk We Went To Room Sneak/hide i Waited 4 Mins for him to Clear room Looted And Left Was Realy Easy Mob Was Up When We arrived nobody in lguk these Days
▲ Page top
MoD is a common drop
QuoteReply
# Dec 15 2004 at 6:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592260865645
52 posts
Went in to LGuk and camped Assassin area and the bridge on the way to his spawn spot. Not really expecting any drops...purely to reap the benefits of the XP increase from this mornings patch. Anyways, Assassin pops twice in a row, dropping the mask both times...and both times the mask rotted away. Being a necro I have no use for one and no one else in the zone wanted it either. So, I would say this is common drop. Also, killing the Assassin and other two mobs is easy at level 45 for a necro...just have scream memmed to handle adds and take them down one at a time using slow/sic pet.
▲ Page top
got today
QuoteReply
# Aug 16 2004 at 4:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1600647478835
5 posts
Hi all, grabbed this today off the assassin, my lvl 3 rogue doesnt like it yet, but in time he will, lol, also got the serrated bone dirk, and the bag off of the supplier who popped before assassin...took about 3 and a half hours, and soloed the room with my 46 monk.
▲ Page top
Easy Breezy
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2004 at 1:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252915646
13 posts
Hi, Lvl 44 Rogue here. I took my friend a lvl 39 SK and a lvl 46 Cleric with me on this little mini raid. It took us three cycles of the spawn before the ghoul assasin poped. Cycle was about 25 minutes. The tough part was finding this place. It is up a ladder at the end of a hallway. Most Mobs were blue to me here. But my friend the SK fell off a bridge into the pit below. So I followed him and we had to fight our way out. I had to scout my way around to find a path out. We were both unfamilar with the area. It was quite an exciting quest. Now I will be called Fuzz Toe no longer. It is not easy to pick up elf chicks as a halfling.

Sorry Chake, unfortunately the mask has to be worn to be used. Thus, race and class restrictions are in effect on this item.

# Mar 16 2004 at 9:10 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591801678987
344 posts
It casts from the inventory chief. I've got it and never worn it, yet it puts the illusion on me. Perhaps you meant that the stat increases don't work unless you put the mask on.
▲ Page top
bard issues with mask
QuoteReply
# Dec 27 2003 at 2:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772440059
Scholar
46 posts
I was lucky to get this mask, but was so disappointed to find I could NOT discharge it, I asked many questions, and I right clicked, I left clicked, I equipped it, I put it in inventory slot, I tried all sorts of things to turn myself into a dark elf all to no avail. People told me I had to be a certain lvl to make it work, but I was already in my early 30's.

Ten lvls later I was frustrated still and finally got an answer from another bard. He asked me "are you singing?" and I noticed that I was, in fact I ALWAYS sing as I love my selos song and am a speed demon. I promptly stopped singing and whalaa, I was able to turn into a dark elf, and I could then begin singing again to turn on selos.

so, if you are having trouble getting your mask to work, take some advice from me and *gasp* make no music for a second, lol, it will work.
▲ Page top
RE: bard issues with mask
QuoteReply
# Feb 13 2004 at 7:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258035378
57 posts
thats odd, whenever i'm singing and go to use a clicky item it says i must stop singing, or something along those lines
